controls.label: Does your business have a Customer Due Diligence — Co-operatives process?
controls.remediation: Your organisation does not have a Customer Due Diligence — Co-operatives process in place. You must establish a documented Customer Due Diligence — Co-operatives process to meet your AML/CTF obligations. Review the controls below and implement the required procedures before completing this assessment.

controls.label: Does your AML/CTF program include risk-based systems and controls to satisfy yourself that a registered co-operative exists and that you have the names of the chairman, secretary or equivalent officers?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based systems and controls
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure for co-operatives does not include appropriate risk-based systems and controls to verify that the co-operative exists and that you hold the names of the chairman, secretary or equivalent officers. Enhance your procedure to include controls that are reasonably designed to satisfy these requirements, as mandated by rules 4.7.2, 4.7.2(1), and 4.7.2(2).

controls.label: Does your procedure require collection of all minimum KYC information about registered co-operatives: full name, address of registered office/principal place of operations, unique registration number, and full names of chairman, secretary and treasurer or equivalent officers?
controls.detail-label: Describe how you collect this information
controls.remediation: Your Collection of KYC Information procedure does not collect all minimum required information for registered co-operatives. Ensure your procedure mandates collection of: full name of the co-operative, address of registered office or principal place of operations (or residential address of secretary/president/treasurer), unique registration number, and full names of chairman, secretary and treasurer or equivalent officers, as required under rules 4.7.3(1), 4.7.3(2), 4.7.3(3), and 4.7.3(4).

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether additional KYC information beyond the minimum should be collected for registered co-operatives?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based decision process for additional collection
controls.remediation: Your Additional KYC Assessment procedure does not include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether additional KYC information should be collected for co-operatives beyond the minimum specified in rule 4.7.3. Implement controls to assess and document whether, based on risk, additional information is necessary, as required by rule 4.7.4.

controls.label: Does your procedure require verification of at least the full name and unique registration number of the co-operative from ASIC, State/Territory/overseas registration bodies, the co-operative's registers, certified copies/extracts, reliable independent documents, or reliable independent electronic data?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not verify the minimum required information (full name and unique registration number) for registered co-operatives from acceptable sources. Update your procedure to verify these details from ASIC, State/Territory/overseas registration bodies, the co-operative's registers, certified copies/extracts, reliable independent documents, or reliable independent electronic data, as required under rules 4.7.5(1) and 4.7.5(2).

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether additional KYC information (beyond the minimum in rule 4.7.5) should be verified?
controls.detail-label: Describe your risk-based decision process for additional verification
controls.remediation: Your Additional KYC Assessment procedure does not include risk-based systems and controls to determine whether information beyond the minimum (name and registration number) should be verified for co-operatives. Implement controls to assess and document whether, based on risk, additional verification of information such as address or officer names is necessary, as required by rule 4.7.6.

controls.label: Does your procedure require that verification of co-operative information be based on at least one of: co-operative registers/certified copies, minutes of meetings/certified copies, State/Territory/overseas registration body information, reliable independent documents, reliable independent electronic data, or a combination of these?
controls.detail-label: Describe which verification methods your procedure requires
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not mandate verification methods from acceptable sources for co-operatives. Update your procedure to require verification based on co-operative registers, certified copies/extracts, meeting minutes, State/Territory/overseas registration body information, reliable independent documents, reliable independent electronic data, or combinations thereof, as specified in rules 4.7.7(1) through 4.7.7(6).

controls.label: Does your procedure permit disclosure certificates to verify co-operative information where the information is not otherwise reasonably available from the sources in rule 4.7.7?
controls.remediation: Your Verification of Identity procedure does not allow for disclosure certificates as a verification method for co-operatives when information is not reasonably available from other sources. Update your procedure to permit disclosure certificates where verification cannot be obtained from ASIC, registration bodies, registers, or other sources listed in rule 4.7.7, as provided for by rules 4.7.8(1) and 4.7.8(2).

controls.label: Does your procedure include risk-based systems and controls to respond to discrepancies that arise during verification of co-operative information, and to determine whether you can be reasonably satisfied about the co-operative's existence and officer names?
controls.remediation: Your Customer Identification Procedure for co-operatives does not include appropriate risk-based systems and controls to manage discrepancies that arise during verification. Implement controls that address verification issues in a way that allows you to determine whether you remain reasonably satisfied about the co-operative's existence and the names of its chairman, secretary and equivalent officers, as required by rule 4.7.9.

groups.title: Process Confirmation
groups.description: Before answering the detailed compliance questions, confirm whether your organisation operates this business process.

groups.title: General CDD Obligation
groups.description: Risk-based systems and controls to verify the existence of the co-operative and obtain the names of key officers

groups.title: Collection of KYC Information
groups.description: Collection procedures for minimum KYC information about registered co-operatives

groups.title: Additional KYC Assessment
groups.description: Risk-based assessment and collection/verification of additional KYC information beyond the minimum requirements

groups.title: Verification of KYC Information
groups.description: Procedures and methods for verifying KYC information about registered co-operatives

groups.title: Disclosure Certificate Procedures
groups.description: Use of disclosure certificates as an alternative verification method when information is not otherwise reasonably available

groups.title: Responding to Discrepancies
groups.description: Systems and controls for responding to discrepancies that arise during verification of co-operative information
